headline.title: SquareMind raises $18M for robotic dermatology platform
headline.description:
Squaremind has raised funding to launch Swan, a robotic platform that automates full-body skin imaging for early cancer detection.

news.title: Sereact gets Series B funding to expand Cortex 2.0 robot brain, enter U.S. market
news.description:
Sereact plans to expand Cortex 2.0 from bin picking to tasks such as assembly and kitting, and it is opening a Boston office.

news.title: Look back on 10 years of legged robots with Ghost Robotics at the Robotics Summit
news.description:
At the summit, Gavin Kenneally, CEO and co-founder of Ghost Robotics, will share lessons from 10 years of deploying quadruped robots.
